findings.message: frontier-resilience-01 is missing physical canonical binary /assets/downloads/frontier-resilience-01.pdf.
1 generated PDF artifacts remain outside /assets/downloads/{slug}.pdf. Legacy inventory should be normalized, but it is not blocking release.
